Improve the plan for test code generation for backend unit test of my app following the guidance below:

1. First, read thoroughly the #file:SSD.md to correctly and fully understand the general aspects of my application.
2. Second, go through every file under the #file:backend and fully understand them. You must think hard to understand even the smallest details of the backend codes. You must understand what's going on at each function, what kind of data is provided and what's the output (data flow), etc. The business logic, the error handling, and all the edge cases should be taken into account.
3. The current version of #file:test-plan-01-backend-unit.md  is too abstract, so I failed to implement correct and complete backend unit test codes. Make it more concrete and precise.:
The plan should include the code snipeet examples to be implemented and also the references to line numbers and the file names in my codebase that would be tested by the codes in those snipeets.
4. BE VERY SPECIFIC in constituting test scenario and test plan; the plan should include what categories and what items (per category) should be tested, why, and how.
